corrections.current: 45δʼ ἂν παρὰ ταῦτα ποιήσῃ ἢ ἀθετήσῃ τι τούτων, ἔνοχος ἔσται. 45
corrections.correct: 45δʼ ἂν παρὰ ταῦτα ποιήσῃ ἢ ἀθετήσῃ τι τούτων, ἔνοχος ἔσται.
corrections.note: Trailing marginal line number 45 has been captured into the body text after the sentence.
The apparatus entry after περιβαληται belongs to ἀκούηται, not ἐξέστιν.
The image reads the variant ακουωνται ℵ for ἀκούηται; the current text has imported material from the following γράφωνται entry.
The γράφωνται apparatus entry is missing and has been replaced by the next lemma's material.
The πᾶσαι entry is displaced; current text shows the following συγγραφαι entry instead.
The image shows συγγραφααι ℵV for συγγραφαι; the current transcription has line-broken and displaced this entry.
This apparatus entry belongs to verse 44, not 43.
Bracketed note '[item 47]' is not present in the printed apparatus.
Hyphenated line break from the print has been incorrectly preserved in the apparatus transcription.
The printed variant reads εθναρβαρχη, not εθναρχη; the unusual form is visible in the image.

notes: Running head and body are otherwise consistent with the scan. Apparatus has several displaced entries around XIV 43 caused by mis-segmentation, plus one stray editorial note and one preserved print hyphen.
